Query your data using natural language through Omni's semantic model

-   More
    
    [Documentation](https://docs.omni.co/ai/mcp)[Privacy Policy](https://www.omni.co/privacy)[Support](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#067573767669747246696b686f286569)
    

Query Omni using the same semantic model, permissions, and logic defined by your data team directly from Claude. Instantly answer questions about your business using natural language — no need to write SQL or navigate complex dashboards. Your Omni semantic model becomes Claude's knowledge of your data, enabling secure, governed, and consistent analytics workflows across your organization.

You can use Omni Analytics to:

**Revenue Analysis:**  
"Show me our Q4 revenue breakdown by product line"

**Customer Metrics:**  
"What's the trend in customer acquisition cost over the last 6 months?"

**Performance Comparison:**  
"Compare our user engagement metrics across different regions"

**Marketing Analytics:**  
"What are the top performing marketing channels by conversion rate?"
